creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
dinoex      2006-10-31 05:41:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/lapispuzzle    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  LapisPuzzle is a tetris-like game which challenges the player by making
  the opposing team's victories count doubly against the player and vice
  versa. Play it and find out!
  
  WWW: http://www.nongnu.org/gap/lapispuzzle/
  PR:             104388
  Submitted by:   Gürkan Sengün
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1047    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/games/lapispuzzle/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/lapispuzzle/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/games/lapispuzzle/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/games/lapispuzzle/pkg-plist (new)
